title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: collapsing pending-graduations pseudo-shards
body: Opened claim 9998b0a8-9e3e-46de-951b-968b9f23c89c to restore owner-gated and residual pending-graduation substance to the canonical .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md register, then delete the pseudo-shard/recovery files after extraction. No commit unless owner asks.
